name: Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Cut in the shortening with 2 knives or a pastry blender until the mixture is the consistency of coarse cornmeal.
3. Make a well in the center of the ingredients; add liquid slowly.
4. When all the liquid has been added, stir the dough vigorously until it comes free from the sides of the bowl.
5. Turn the dough onto a lightly floured board and knead lightly for a few minutes.
6. Roll or pat out to the desired thickness and cut with 2-inch floured biscuit cutter.
7. Place on an ungreased baking sheet and bake at 450 degrees for 12-15 minutes.
Makes 15-18 biscuits.
Variations: You can substitute half whole wheat flour and also add grated cheese and garlic powder.
